1: O God, to whom vengeance belongeth, shew thyself.
2: Render a reward to the proud.
3: How long shall the wicked triumph?
4: And And all the workers of iniquity boast themselves?
7: Neither shall the God of Jacob regard it it .
8: And ye ye fools, when will ye be wise?
9: He that formed the eye, shall he not see?
10: He that teacheth man knowledge, shall not he know? shall not he know?
12: And teachest him out of thy law;
13: Until the pit be digged for the wicked.
14: Neither will he forsake his inheritance.
15: And all the upright in heart shall follow it.
16: Or Or who will stand up for me against the workers of iniquity?
17: My soul had almost dwelt in silence.
18: Thy mercy, O LORD LORD , held me up.
20: Which frameth mischief by a law?
22: And my God is is the rock of my refuge.
23: Yea Yea , the LORD LORD our God shall cut them off.
